Appearances:
Plaintiff, Tenderloin Housing Clinic is present. Represented by Joseph Russell
Attorney, Michael Rossoff, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Roberto Samayoa, is present.
Attorney, John Weinstein , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Dennis Hyde, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JUL-12-2010 is vacated.
